title: Fixed Leather Horse Armor
description: Fixes the tint on the leather horse armor and applies the updated texture from bedrock edition.
body:
# This pack isn't going to be updated, since vanilla is now identitcal to it.

## Summary
This is a simple pack that Removes the horse armor tint from areas it should be applied to, like how tinting works on player leather armor, and makes the texture the updated one from bedrock edition.

## Credits
Me cus Im awesome
